title: Gooey American Carob Crumble with Ras El Hanout
description: A sweet and gooey dessert featuring gluten-free-friendly ingredients like carob and ras el hanout for a cozy American flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 cups almond flour
ingredients.notes: Substitute with gluten-free oat flour if needed

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup carob powder
ingredients.notes: Replace with dark chocolate chips for added sweetness and texture

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup honey syrup
ingredients.notes: Can be made by mixing 1/4 cup cornstarch with 1/4 cup water and reducing to a thick syrup over medium heat, stirring continuously until bubbly. Cool before using.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons finely chopped walnuts
ingredients.notes: Optional garnish for added crunch and flavor

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease an 8x8 inch baking dish.
In a large bowl, mix together the almond flour, carob powder, unsweetened applesauce, eggs, honey syrup, vanilla extract, and salt. Stir until well combined; add melted butter and walnuts if using.
Transfer batter to prepared baking dish. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean from the center.
Let cool slightly before slicing into individual servings.
